titleStmt.title: SII 29.40: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 40. (A.R. No. B. 815 of 1962-63.) DODDALA, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: It refers to the reign of Chālukya Bhuvanaikamalladēva [Sōmēśvara II] and to his feudatory Peḍakalu Jatāchōḷabhīma-mahārāja of Kali kālānvaya, who is eulogized very much with epithets-Kāvērīvallabha, mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara, Oṟeyūr puravarēśvara etc.

On the date specified another feudatory of the king mahāsamanta Maḷeyamarasa of Mānuve made grant of 24 mattar of fertile land, one mattar extent flower garden, one oil-mill and 5 house sites to Girigōṭemalla-Jinalaya built by Mākiseṭṭi at Ponnapāḷu, mahāsāmanta Maḷeyamarasa is described as māhishmatī puravarēśvara, i.e., lord of the city Māhishmatī and bears the epithet girigōṭemalla among others.
The record is dated Śaka 991, Saumya, uttarayana sankrānti. It corresponds to 1069 A.D., December 24, Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārāja
dhirāja paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vi
jaya rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārka tāraṁba
ra saluttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi samadhigata paṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ Aridurddharavara bhujasi bhāsura pra
caṁṇḍa pradyōdinakara kuḷanaṁdanaṁ kāsyapagōtraṁ kalikālānvayaṁ kā
vērī vallabhaṁ kaṁbalpaṟi ghōṣaṇa mayūra piṁcchadhvajaṁ siṁhalāṁcanaṁ O
ṟeyūrppuravarēśvaraṁ paracakra vimaḷaṁ melvāḷa bhimaṁ gōtra pavitraṁ śrī
manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara peḍakalu jaṭācōḷa bhīma mahārājaru . samadhigata paṁca
mahāśabda mahāsāmaṁntaṁ vijayalakṣmīkāntaṁ māhiṣmatīpuravarēśvaraṁ madhya
dēśādhipati sahasra bāhu pratāpaṁ nijānvaya māṇikyanēkavākyaṁ catu
ra cārāyaṇanupāya nārāyaṇaṁ girigōṭemallaṁ ripuhṛda
yasellaṁ viṣama hayārūḍha rēvanta parabaḷakritānta maṁgiya
maruḷaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmanta mānuveya maḷeyamarasar sakava
rṣa 991 neya saumya saṁvatsara duttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyativa ni
mityadiṁ śrī muttava mantakōlada mākiseṭṭiyar ponnapāḷal māḍi
sida girigōṭemalla jinālayakke ponnapāḷa paḍuvaṇa polamēreya
lu biṭṭa nigara mattarāṟu Ā poḍḍiyal kantarikeyalu nigaraṁ mattarā
ṟu koraviya teṁkavoladalu biṭṭa nigaraṁ mattarppanneraḍu Antu ma
tta 24 pūdōṭa matta 1 gāṇa 1 maneya nivēśana 5
sāmānyoyaṁ dharmma(sē)tu nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō
bhavadbhi sarvvāṁ nētāṁ bāvina pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yāca
te rāmacaṁdraṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ dvādi harēti vasandharā ṣa
ṣṭiṁ vvarṣa sahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 29.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
